panel.title: Chat
panel.readonly_badge_title: Side-effect tools (launch_pipeline / stop_pipeline) wait for an approval card before running.
panel.empty: Ask Claude about a run, a finding, or a property id.

list.title: Runs
list.empty_line2: Create one with uv run python3 scripts/run_phase.py ..., or launch from the UI in v1.

detail.logs_dropped_title: Backend dropped log lines under high throughput.
detail.phases_empty: No phases recorded for this run.

live.disconnected: Disconnected. Refresh the page to retry.

confirm.title: Cancel this audit run?
confirm.description: The current phase will be terminated (SIGTERM). Partial outputs are preserved.

rerun.dialog_description: Selected phases will be re-executed with --force. Existing partial outputs for those phases will be re-generated.
rerun.no_failed_phases: No failed phases. Choose specific phases to re-run.

budget_gauge.tooltip_over: Budget cap exceeded — runner will halt.

budget_cap.open_button_title: Set or bump budget cap (CLI spec §5.3.3)
budget_cap.title: Set budget cap
budget_cap.description: Currently spent: ${{spent}} · cap: ${{cap}}. Enter a new USD cap or clear it to remove enforcement.
budget_cap.warn_below_spent: Cap is below the current spend — the run would be over the new cap immediately.

phase_row.no_log_preview: No log preview yet. Logs stream in v1.
phase_row.keyhelp: Enter: expand · l: open log · f: force re-run

list.title: Findings
list.banner_text: Per-run display arrives in v1. Currently showing {{count}} finding(s).
list.empty_line1: No findings to display for this run.

detail.ask_claude_hint: Opens the chat panel with this finding attached as context.
detail.ask_claude_draft_message: Tell me about this finding ({{property_id}}). Is it exploitable, and what is the impact?

filter.dsl_help: Keys: severity: / verdict: / prop: / repo: (pipe-separate alternatives, AND with spaces).
filter.dsl_unknown_keys: Unknown filter key(s) treated as free text: {{keys}}

page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: v0 is read-only. Write actions (logout, API key rotation, target repo picker) ship in v1.
page.maintenance_hint: Open config files or run state in VSCode. Requires the VSCode CLI (`code`) on PATH.

fork.title: Fork target repository to GitHub
fork.description: Fork the target repo to your GitHub account via the `gh` CLI. Useful to prepare a fix PR after a finding.
fork.gh_required_tooltip: Install gh CLI and run `gh auth login` first.

confirm.title: Fork {{repo}} to your GitHub?
confirm.description: This will create a fork under your authenticated GitHub account.

error.gh_unauthed: gh CLI is not authenticated. Run `gh auth login`.

page.title: Diagnostics
page.subtitle: Probe the local environment the way `speca doctor` does. Read-only.

auth.method_api_key: logged in via Anthropic API key
auth.none: no Claude session and no API key

summary.all_ok_hint: Every tool the pipeline needs is present and healthy. You can launch a new audit.
summary.attention_hint: Install or update the items flagged below before launching an audit. See the install hints section.

install.hint: Run the matching command for your platform. Restart the SPECA server after installing PATH-resolved binaries.

login.title: Sign in to SPECA
login.subtitle: Local web UI — credentials never leave your machine.
login.oauth_hint_default: Opened OAuth flow in a separate window.
login.error_signin_unknown: Sign in failed for an unknown reason.
login.error_oauth_unknown: OAuth spawn failed for an unknown reason.

open_in_vscode.missing_hint: VSCode CLI (`code`) not found. Check your PATH.

glossary.CWE: Common Weakness Enumeration — a standard taxonomy of software weaknesses (e.g. CWE-22 Path Traversal).
glossary.STRIDE: Threat modeling framework: Spoofing / Tampering / Repudiation / Information disclosure / Denial of service / Elevation of privilege.
glossary.property: A formal security property — an invariant of the form 'X always holds', generated by Phase 01e.
glossary.subgraph: State transition graph extracted from the spec. Mermaid format with invariants attached to each node. Output of Phase 01b.
glossary.verdict: The final Phase 04 verdict — one of six: CONFIRMED_VULNERABILITY / CONFIRMED_POTENTIAL / DISPUTED_FP / DOWNGRADED / NEEDS_MANUAL_REVIEW / PASS_THROUGH.
glossary.severity: Vulnerability severity — Critical / High / Medium / Low / Informational.
glossary.phase 03: Audit Map — proof-based verification that each property holds against target code.
glossary.phase 04: Review — a recall-safe 3-gate (Dead Code / Trust Boundary / Scope Check) false-positive filter pipeline.
glossary.bug bounty scope: The in-scope / out-of-scope definition of the target bug bounty program. Persisted in `BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json`.
glossary.trust boundary: A line where external input reaches internal processing. Findings that cross this boundary are less likely to be false positives.
glossary.dead code: Phase 04 Gate 1 — rejects findings reported on code paths that cannot be reached at runtime.
glossary.DISPUTED_FP: A verdict marking a finding as a false positive, set by one of the three Phase 04 gates. Recall-safe design: only these three gates may emit FP verdicts.
glossary.CONFIRMED_VULNERABILITY: A finding confirmed by Phase 04 as a true vulnerability. The primary candidate for reporting.

demo.modal_body: {{repo}} is read-only preview in v0. Launching audit runs ships in v1.

page.title: New audit
page.subtitle: Pick a target. Three entries, one confirmation form.

wizard.title: Guided new-audit setup
wizard.subtitle: One question at a time. Mirrors `speca init` (CLI).
wizard.hint_project_type: Picks the right default trust model and tool palette downstream.
wizard.q_target_repo: Paste the GitHub `owner/repo` of the target.
wizard.hint_target_repo: Example: `sigp/lighthouse`. SPECA clones this on launch.
wizard.q_target_ref: Pin a specific branch, tag, or commit?
wizard.hint_target_ref: Leave blank to use the default branch HEAD.
wizard.q_scope: Bug bounty program or in-scope assets?
wizard.hint_scope: Bounty URL is optional. Addresses / paths help SPECA narrow the analysis.
wizard.q_spec_urls: Specification URLs to crawl in Phase 01a (optional).
wizard.hint_spec_urls: Comma- or newline-separated. Leave blank to skip spec ingestion.
wizard.hint_review: Review your answers below. Advanced options (workers, push) are on the next page.
wizard.advanced_hint: Need to tweak workers / push-to-remote? Continue to the
